data.title: This Rocket Lab Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Friday
data.description:
Top Wall Street analysts changed their outlook on these top names. For a complete view of all analyst rating changes, including upgrades, downgrades and initiations, please see our analyst ratings page.

  • Keybanc analyst Noah Zatzkin upgraded Topgolf Callaway Brands Corp. (NYSE:MODG) from Sector Weight to Overweight and announced a $17 price target. Topgolf Callaway Brands shares closed at $14.68 on Thursday. See how other analysts view this stock.
  • Morgan Stanley analyst Kristine Liwag upgraded Rocket Lab Corp (NASDAQ:RKLB) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raised the price target from $67 to $105. Rocket Lab shares closed at $90.76 on Thursday. See how other analysts view this stock.
  • HSBC analyst Piyush Choudhary upgraded Grab Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ:GRAB) from Hold to Buy and announced a $6.2 price target. Grab Holdings shares closed at $4.39 on Thursday. See how other analysts view this stock.
  • Keybanc analyst Noah Zatzkin upgraded Yeti Holdings Inc (NYSE:YETI) from Sector Weight to Overweight and announced a $57 price target. YETI Holdings shares closed at $49.34 on Thursday. See how other analysts view this stock.
  • Goldman Sachs analyst Asad Haider upgraded BioNTech SE (NASDAQ:BNTX) from Neutral to Buy and raised the price target from $115 to $142. BioNTech shares closed at $106.07 on Thursday. See how other analysts view this stock.

Considering buying RKLB stock? Here’s what analysts think:

data.title: Qnity Electronics CFO Matt Harbaugh Steps Down Immediately
data.description:
Qnity Electronics, Inc. (NYSE:Q) shares are trading slightly higher premarket on Friday after the company disclosed that Matt Harbaugh stepped down immediately as Chief Financial Officer (CFO) for health reasons.

Mike Goss, the company's Principal Accounting Officer and Controller, has been named Interim CFO effective immediately.

Before serving as Qnity's Principal Accounting Officer and Controller, he spent 14 years at DuPont, holding several senior positions and gaining expertise in portfolio transformation and financial operations, most recently as Vice President, Principal Accounting Officer, and Controller from December 2018 to October 2025.

Prior to DuPont, Mike held various roles at Ernst & Young.

The company said it will conduct a comprehensive search for the position.

Guidance

Qnity confirms its full-year 2025 guidance, projecting Net Sales of approximately $4.7 billion (vs. consensus of $4.72 billion)and Adjusted Pro Forma Operating EBITDA of around $1.4 billion.

Qnity plans to release financial results on February 26, 2026.

Qnity Technical Analysis

Qnity Electronics, Inc. (Q) is currently showing a bullish setup with its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) positioned above the 50-day SMA. This indicates that Qnity Electronics, Inc.'s stock is in a positive trend, suggesting potential upward momentum for traders to consider.

The relative strength index (RSI) sits at 64.10, which is neutral but leans towards overbought territory. This level indicates that while there is some bullish momentum, traders should be cautious of a potential pullback if the RSI moves higher.

Currently, the MACD is above its signal line, signaling bullish momentum for Qnity Electronics, Inc. This suggests that the stock could continue to gain strength, and traders might want to watch for further confirmation of this trend.

As for support and resistance, there are no defined levels at this time, which means traders should be alert for any price action that could establish these critical points.

If the stock begins to test new highs or lows, it could signal a trend change or continuation that traders need to act on.

Looking at the longer-term picture, Qnity Electronics, Inc.'s stock has experienced a 12-month performance decline of 4.00%. This downtrend highlights the importance of monitoring price action closely, as any recovery could signify a shift in market sentiment.

The stock's recent swing high on November 5, 2025, at $105.40, and swing low on November 24, 2025, at $72.81, are key points to consider. These levels provide context for where the stock has been and where it might be heading in the near future.

With the current technical indicators and the recent price action, traders should remain vigilant for any signs of a breakout or reversal.

Q Price Action: Qnity Electronics shares were up 0.73% at $93.80 during premarket trading on Friday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo by T. Schneider via Shutterstock

data.title: TikTok Coins Are 'The Next Meta'—But What Are They Exactly?
data.description:
TikTok coins are supposedly “the next meta in the trenches,” indicating how Gen Z slang can wrongfoot even experienced traders like crypto veteran Jordan Fish.

What TikTok Coins Actually Are

TikTok coins are meme coins that get promoted on TikTok instead of traditional crypto platforms like X, Telegram or Discord.

Most launch on Pump Fun (CRYPTO: PUMP) and trade on Solana (CRYPTO: SOL). The coins are based on viral TikTok trends, memes, and Gen Z culture rather than crypto narratives.

Pump Fun founder Alon Cohen has already flagged the trend as it gains traction.

Why Crypto Veterans Are Confused

Fish, known as Cobie in crypto circles, asked this simple question and got replies like “TikTok coins are what Chill Guy was back in the day ser.”

Chill Guy is a cartoon dog meme from October 2023 that went viral on TikTok. Users reference it to show they’re staying calm during stressful situations.

Another reply said TikTok coins are “basically anything relevant to normies, like jestermaxxing.”

Jestermaxxing means posting exaggerated humor content on social media for validation and social acceptance. The term came from online communities and spread to mainstream TikTok culture.

The Language Barrier Is Intentional

Younger traders use TikTok slang and meme references specifically to keep older crypto investors out of the loop.

If you don’t follow TikTok trends, anime culture, and the constantly evolving Gen Z language, you can’t identify which coins are about to pump.

The coin names aren’t secret, but knowing which TikTok trends will drive buying requires being plugged into the platform’s culture.

Why This Matters For Traders

Crypto traders who rely on X and Discord for information are missing an entire distribution channel where younger retail investors gather.

TikTok coins represent a new memecoin marketing model where viral content drives pumps instead of Discord communities or X threads.

Whether these coins deliver returns or just extract money from younger traders remains unclear, but the trend shows memecoin culture expanding beyond crypto’s traditional platforms.

Image: Shutterstock

data.title: Wipro's Best Margins In Years Can't Mask Soft Bookings, Profit Dip
data.description:
Wipro Ltd (NYSE:WIT) on Friday reported third-quarter fiscal 2026 gross revenue of 235.6 billion rupees ($2.622 billion), up 5.5% year over year, narrowly surpassing the analyst consensus estimate of $2.620 billion. IT Services revenue rose 0.2% year over year to $2.635 billion, while earnings per share of 4 cents came in line with expectations.

Revenue Mix And Profitability

Despite the headline growth, adjusted constant-currency revenue in the IT Services segment declined 1.2% year over year. IT Services operating margin improved to 17.6%, up 10 basis points from a year earlier. Net income fell 7% year over year to 31.2 billion rupees ($347.2 million), while operating cash flow declined 13.6% to 42.6 billion rupees ($474.1 million).

Total bookings were $3.34 billion, down 5.7% year over year on a constant-currency basis. Large-deal bookings totaled $871 million, a decrease of 8.4% year over year in constant currency.

Voluntary attrition was 14.2% on a trailing 12-month basis.

Management Commentary

CEO and Managing Director Srini Pallia said artificial intelligence is playing an increasingly strategic role at the company. He said Wipro Intelligence helped drive multiple client wins, supported wider adoption of AI-enabled platforms and solutions, enabled scaled AI-led delivery through WINGS and WEGA, and expanded Wipro's global innovation network.

CFO Aparna Iyer said IT Services operating margins rose to 17.6%, marking the company's strongest margin performance in several years. She added that disciplined execution drove strong operating cash flow, which reached 135% of net income during the quarter.

Dividends And Outlook

Iyer said the board approved an interim dividend of 6 rupees per share, taking total shareholder payouts for the year to $1.3 billion. Wipro expects IT Services revenue of $2.635 billion to $2.688 billion for the next quarter, implying flat to 2% sequential growth in constant-currency terms.

WIT Price Action: Wipro shares were down 3.03% at $2.88 during premarket trading on Friday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo by Sundry Photography via Shutterstock
